license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xsnfnde
title: U Mass - Body composition (organs)
author: Jason Kim

steps_raw.instruction: Euthanize mice using intraperitoneal injection of pentobarbital.
Quickly dissect and extract specific organs to measure their composition.
Place specific organ into an instrument column.
Measure composition of organ using instrument standard operating procedure.
